notes:
v2.4.6 Hotfix
✨ External theme API: Adapters and companion modules can now register HUD themes with api.registerTheme() and read them with api.getThemes().
🐛 Theme registration fix: External themes now write to the config theme registry, so they appear reliably in the theme selector.
🐛 Theme selector labels: Built-in theme names no longer show localization keys such as IBHUD.Config.Themes.Iron.

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.4.6
announcement.content:
v2.4.6 adds the external theme API and fixes theme selector display issues.

  • External theme API: Adapters and companion modules can register custom themes with api.registerTheme().
  • Theme registry fix: Registered themes now use the same registry as the HUD config panel.
  • Theme selector labels: Built-in theme names now display normally instead of showing localization keys.
